idea-plugin.name: Spotify Player
idea-plugin.description:
Control Spotify without leaving your JetBrains IDE.
  • Current track with cover art and progress bar
  • Play / pause, next and previous
  • Shuffle mode with a single click
  • Real-time playback queue with cover art
  • Click a track in the queue to play it
  • Save / remove tracks (Liked Songs)
  • Current track shown in the status bar
Works in any JetBrains IDE (IntelliJ IDEA, PhpStorm, WebStorm, PyCharm, GoLand, and more).
Requires a Spotify account. Playback controls and the queue require Spotify Premium.
